title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game**
*2026*
Develop your character, fulfill quests, and shape history in 15th-century Bohemia.
![Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_58c64a5d.png)

2. **Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game**
*None*
The land of milk and honey is filling up with blood - make sure it's not yours.
![Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_bc9b448f.jpg)

3. **Wingspan Pocket**
*2026*
Swiftly build and activate a row of colorful birds.
![Wingspan Pocket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_0359c41f.jpg)

4. **Duel of Meloch**
*2026*
Scythe vs Expeditions: Clash head-to-head on a tight map in a race to victory.
![Duel of Meloch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_c5e006ba.png)

5. **Container**
*2026*
Set prices as you produce, sell, and ship containers in a tight economic simulation.
![Container](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_f2435701.jpg)

6. **dnup**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_9b5afe9a.jpg)

7. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_d1e89ffd.jpg)

8. **The Quest for El Dorado**
*2017*
Race through a dense South American jungle in pursuit of the legendary city of gold.
![The Quest for El Dorado](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_352f9f9f.jpg)

9. **The Glorious Guilds of Buttonville**
*2025*
Assemble villagers to help recover the glory of Buttonville.
![The Glorious Guilds of Buttonville](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_e76b4d30.jpg)

10. **Politik**
*2026*
Nations compete for military, political and corporate control of a fallen world.
![Politik](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_0cf5dc05.jpg)

11. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_ba1cb80d.jpg)

12. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_d8ff0f0f.jpg)

13. **Defenders of Hogwarts**
*2026*
Will you defend Hogwarts? Or choose to join the Dark Forces?
![Defenders of Hogwarts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_1f8d647e.jpg)

14. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_4ce5733d.png)

15. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_5ad4a90a.jpg)

16. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_afe6723b.jpg)

17. **Rolling Deep**
*2027*
Journey to the Center of the Earth in this Balatro-inspired roguelike dice game.
![Rolling Deep](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_72703858.jpg)

18. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_a7302a01.jpg)

19. **Sankoré: The Pride of Mansa Musa**
*2024*
Compete to manage the best school of a university in 14th-century Timbuktu.
![Sankoré: The Pride of Mansa Musa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_a46c7446.jpg)

20. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_56864299.jpg)

21. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_628efb1b.png)

22. **FlipToons: Season 2**
*2026*
Audition a fresh new cast of talented Toons to star in your next animated feature!
![FlipToons: Season 2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_6f6179e0.png)

23. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_9f2e6e2c.jpg)

24. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_b7bd4ce6.jpg)

25. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_4dbe1178.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*18 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_4dc1b7ef.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*26 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_6441ff98.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*21 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_d7ebaf5d.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*54 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_97a43130.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*90 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_a77704e6.jpg)

6. **Azul**
*104 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_4e3414c3.png)

7. **Bomb Busters**
*14 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*117 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.

9. **Sea Salt & Paper**

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*43 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_7fba73c3.jpg)

11. **Faraway**
*26 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_545474e5.png)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*33 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_b42c0712.jpg)

13. **Cascadia**
*59 months on the list*

![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-04/toplist/bgg_022a915d.jpg)
